raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I used my personal American Express credit card to purchase domain from XXXX. I intended to purchase a domain priced at approximately {$22.00}. XXXX charge in that amount was processed correctly. 

However, a XXXX  charge of {$15000.00} was processed for a premium domain that was not clearly disclosed at that price. The domain appeared to be priced similarly ( around {$22.00} ), and I did not knowingly agree to a purchase of {$15000.00}. 

I immediately contacted the merchant and American Express. I requested a full breakdown of the charge and proof that the premium price was clearly presented and accepted prior to the transaction. The information provided was not clear or sufficient. 

I filed multiple disputes with American Express, all of which were denied, including after escalation to a supervisor. Despite this, I maintain that this charge resulted from misleading pricing and does not reflect an informed or intentional purchase. 

I have been a responsible customer and have always paid my account on time. I am requesting that American Express reverse the {$15000.00} charge, as it was not a purchase I knowingly authorized at that price.
